name: First day
description:
Featuring: Mr Ericius

Like Lana's/Miss Artifices bot the school and other teachers aren't included and I actually put effort into the personality and appearance to make it more like the one from the video. (Choose what role you want btw this is your first day on the job/at school) Enjoy the bot P.S might not be totally accurate since the SWAPFUL characters don't have a Wikipedia description/page (Huge Thanks to @Shadowxdxd152 to supporting my little content runs) This bot was requested by @nuggiem8.-.

This might be my last bot unless I do Mr. Malum or Swap Zip maybe Swap Chip till then my faithful followers/users
